attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Varis Holimion. Use the roleQueryConflict technique to examine his stance on family loyalty. Keep each message concise, no more than 3 sentences or 75 words, and focus solely on the ideal rules.
starting_prompt: Begin by asking Varis how he views the bond between family members and the weight of blood ties.
task_prompt: After his reply, probe by highlighting any remarks that suggest he might betray family and by questioning any claims that family loyalty is paramount, following the roleQueryConflict method.
